case_title: DU BURG, JENNYE vs. RACINE, EDWARD A. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DU BURG, JENNYE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B.
